task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a private channel named 'phoenix-migration' (usually denoted by a lock icon) in the left sidebar or at the top of the chat window.
Look for the topic 'Cloud Infrastructure Migration | Q1-Q2 2026 | PM: admin' in the channel header or within the channel information panel.
Look for the description 'Main coordination channel for the Phoenix cloud migration project' in the channel information or details panel.

task_completion.description: Assign the required team members to 'phoenix-migration'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the members list for the 'phoenix-migration' channel. Verify the presence of users: fe.lead, be.lead, qa.tester, ux.designer, pm.coordinator, and devops.lead.
Look for a public channel named 'phoenix-frontend' (usually denoted by a hashtag icon) in the left sidebar.
Look for a public channel named 'phoenix-backend' in the left sidebar.
Look for a public channel named 'phoenix-devops' in the left sidebar.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Rocket.Chat web interface being actively used (clicking menus, typing in fields), rather than terminal windows executing API curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application
integrity.visual_evidence: The channels and settings should be visible within the standard Rocket.Chat layout, not just typed out as text in a notepad or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Elements/Console tab) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM to display the channel names or topics.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating one private main channel ('phoenix-migration') and three public sub-channels ('phoenix-frontend', 'phoenix-backend', 'phoenix-devops'). The main channel must have the topic 'Cloud Infrastructure Migration | Q1-Q2 2026 | PM: admin' and the description 'Main coordination channel for the Phoenix cloud migration project'. The main channel must include exactly these 6 members: fe.lead, be.lead, qa.tester, ux.designer, pm.coordinator, devops.lead.
